name: Matthew McGahey
title: President & Owner
bio: Matt joined Steadfast on January 1, 2013 and became President and Owner on January 1, 2022. He came to the firm after five years at Enterprise Rent-a-Car, where he achieved branch management status. Between 2013 and 2017 he earned the CFP®, ChFC®, and RICP® designations from The American College, and more recently added the CKA® designation focused on ethical financial stewardship.
education: Bachelor of Science in Business Management, University of Central Florida (2008)
personal: Matt is married to Joy and has three sons — Caleb, Zachary, and Keegan. He's active in Grace Church Orlando and involved in its foster family ministry. Outside of work he enjoys fishing, surfing, college football, golf, running, and coaching basketball.

name: Paul Bush
title: Financial Advisor
bio:
Paul is deeply passionate about helping individuals steward their resources well. He believes that financial planning is ultimately about trust — walking alongside clients with clarity, integrity, and their best interests at heart. He brings a disciplined, strategic approach to financial planning, paired with a strong relational focus.

In addition to his financial background, Paul has over 15 years of organizational leadership experience in pastoral ministry. He currently serves as the Lead Pastor of a growing church. This combination of financial expertise and people-centered leadership shapes his thoughtful, values-driven approach to serving clients. Highly organized and deeply relational, Paul is motivated by a strong desire to see financial resources used wisely and purposefully.
education:
Bachelor of Science in Finance, University of Central Florida (2008)
Master of Divinity, Gordon-Conwell Theological Seminary
personal: Paul is happily married to his wife, Karis, and they are raising three children together. He brings the same care, responsibility, and long-term perspective to his clients that he values in his own family life.

name: Raymond Johnson
title: Founder
bio: Raymond established Steadfast Financial Services in 1998, bringing more than twenty years of experience in accounting, tax, and financial planning — including eight years as a partner with Ronald Blue & Company. His steady hand shaped the firm's fee-only, relationship-first philosophy.
education:
Bachelor of Science in Finance, University of Central Florida (1973)
Master of Science in Accounting, University of Central Florida (1976)
Master of Taxation, University of Denver (1982)
personal: Raymond is married with four children and thirteen grandchildren. He enjoys family time, reading, traveling, and golf, and has served on the boards of several charitable organizations.
